founders.name: Kevin Garcia
founders.title: Co-Founder
founders.description: Ex-Rocket Lab — 10 years of propulsion engineering. Lead CAPSTONE engine development testing. Touched every successful Rocket Lab engine. Over 44 launches. Also worked for SpaceX and The Exploration Company.
